docker_attempt.reason: Docker daemon remained unresponsive after an unrelated interrupted Sage image-layer pull; the TenSEAL build produced no output and was terminated without a retry.
docker_attempt.interpretation: No Linux timing can be inferred from this failed infrastructure attempt. The Windows results remain the primary measured evidence.
